asyncByDefault.description: Run team workflows in detached async mode by default when the tool call omits async.

executeWorkers.description: Allow real child Pi workers without setting PI_TEAMS_EXECUTE_WORKERS=1.

notifierIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for async completion notifications.

requireCleanWorktreeLeader.description: Require a clean leader git repository before provisioning worktrees.

autonomous.description: Autonomous team routing policy injected into the agent system prompt.
